message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle normal
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantAlignment left
skinparam participantTextAlignment left
skinparam participantTextPadding 5
skinparam participantTextMargin 5
skinparam participantTextBorderThickness 0
skinparam participantTextBorderRadius 0
skinparam participantTextShadowing false
skinparam participantTextAlignment left
skinparam participantTextPadding 5
skinparam participantTextMargin 5
skinparam participantTextBorderThickness 0
skinparam participantTextBorderRadius 0
skinparam participantTextShadowing false

participant "beerocks_cli" as beerocks_cli
participant "bml_internal" as bml_internal
participant "controller" as controller
participant "controller_db" as controller_db

beerocks_cli -> beerocks_cli: beerocks_cli -c "bml_clear_wifi_credentials <al-mac>"
activate beerocks_cli
beerocks_cli -> beerocks_cli: cli_bml::clear_wifi_credentials_caller(args)
deactivate beerocks_cli
activate beerocks_cli
beerocks_cli -> beerocks_cli: cli_bml::clear_wifi_credentials(args.stringArgs[0])
deactivate beerocks_cli
activate beerocks_cli
beerocks_cli -> beerocks_cli: bml_clear_wifi_credentials(ctx, al-mac.c_str())
deactivate beerocks_cli
activate beerocks_cli
beerocks_cli -> bml_internal: clear_wifi_credentials(const sMacAddr &al_mac)
deactivate beerocks_cli
activate bml_internal
bml_internal -> controller: message_com::send_cmdu(m_sockMaster, ACTION_BML_WIFI_CREDENTIALS_CLEAR_REQUEST)
deactivate bml_internal
activate controller
controller -> controller_db: clear_bss_info_configuration(const sMacAddr &al_mac)
deactivate controller
activate controller_db
controller_db -> controller: message_com::send_cmdu(m_sockMaster, ACTION_BML_WIFI_CREDENTIALS_CLEAR_RESPONSE)
deactivate controller_db
activate controller
controller -> bml_internal: message_com::send_cmdu(m_sockMaster, ACTION_BML_WIFI_CREDENTIALS_CLEAR_RESPONSE)
deactivate controller
activate bml_internal
@enduml
